title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores how logarithmic transformations of complex numbers can be applied to images, using Escher's Print Gallery as a case study. The video demonstrates conformal maps from complex analysis and explains the complex exponential and logarithm as tools for understanding image warping.
